actions-list.actionItem: The Speaker announced that the House do now adjourn pursuant to clause 13 of Rule I. The next meeting is scheduled for 10:30 a.m. on July 6, 2026.
The Chair led the House in reciting the Pledge of Allegiance to the Flag.
Pursuant to clause 13 of Rule I, the Journal of the last day's proceedings was approved.
Today's prayer was offered by Minister Andy Brewster, Jefferson Avenue Church of Christ, Cookeville, Tennessee
The Speaker designated the Honorable John W. Rose to act as Speaker pro tempore for today.
The House convened, starting a new legislative day.
